home.heroSubtitle: I explore how emotions influence decisions, leadership, and human systems.
home.newsletterDescription: Receive ideas about emotions, decisions, and human systems.
home.principle: Organizations have learned to manage money, processes, and technology. But they are still learning to manage something fundamental: emotions.

whatIDo.title: What I Do
whatIDo.pillar1Desc: I work with organizations to develop leadership and culture based on emotional intelligence.
whatIDo.pillar2Desc: An organizational model that proposes managing emotional resources like energy, trust, attention, and commitment.
whatIDo.pillar3Desc: ROWI and ROWIIA. Technology that helps understand emotional patterns and decisions.
whatIDo.pillar4Desc: Exploring how emotions, decisions, and structures create organizational systems.
